task_completion.description: Configure the view to Coronal Minimum Intensity Projection (MinIP) with appropriate slab thickness to visualize airways.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The viewer should show a Coronal slice. The image style should be MinIP (airways appear as continuous dark tubes/branches). The slab thickness (20-30mm) might be visible in the slice controller or implied by the depth of the airway tree visibility.

task_completion.description: Center the view on the trachea and carina in the coronal plane.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main view should be centered on the central chest, clearly showing the trachea descending and splitting at the carina.

task_completion.description: Place fiducial markers on the Trachea, Carina, Right Main Bronchus, Left Main Bronchus, and a Lobar Bronchus.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Visible markup points (dots/stars) placed at the bifurcation (carina), along the vertical trachea, and on the left/right branching bronchi.

task_completion.description: Measure the Trachea diameter using the ruler tool.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A measurement line/ruler drawn across the trachea (approx 2cm above the split). The value displayed should be approximately 20mm (17-23mm range).

task_completion.description: Measure the Right and Left Main Bronchus diameters using the ruler tool.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Measurement lines/rulers drawn across the right and left main bronchi. Values should be approximately 14mm for Right (11-17mm) and 12mm for Left (9-15mm).

task_completion.description: Save the screenshot, landmarks, and measurements to the specified paths.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, file browser, or terminal output confirming the creation of 'minip_airway_visualization.png', 'airway_landmarks.mrk.json', and 'airway_measurements.json'.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the application GUI tools (Markups, Ruler/Line) rather than estimating or hardcoding values.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Markups module active, ruler widgets visible on the image, or mouse interaction with the toolbar.

integrity.description: Ensure the measurements report was not manually typed into a text editor without performing measurements.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should not be seen typing numbers like '20' or '14' into a JSON file in a text editor unless those numbers were clearly derived from a visible measurement tool in the previous step.

integrity.description: Confirm the agent is interacting with the actual medical imaging software (e.g., 3D Slicer).
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should match the standard layout of 3D Slicer or the specific medical viewer provided in the environment.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset is a synthetic chest CT with specific ground truth airway dimensions: Trachea ~20mm, Right Main Bronchus ~14mm, Left Main Bronchus ~12mm. In MinIP (Minimum Intensity Projection) mode, airways appear as dark, continuous branching tubes against lighter tissue. Valid measurements in the screenshots should be within +/- 3mm of these ground truth values.
